provisions.content: This order may be cited as the Prohibited Imports (Tanzania) (Lottery Tickets) Order.

(1) The direct or indirect importation into Tanzania of any lottery ticket relating to a lottery which— (a) is managed at any place outside Tanzania; or (b) if managed within Tanzania or partly within and partly outside Tanzania, is not a lottery approved, for the purposes of section 173 of the penal Code, by the Director of Government Lotteries, is prohibited. (2) In this Order, lottery ticket includes any document or token— (a) the purchase of which constitutes the purchase of a chance in a lottery; or (b) which records or evidences the purchase of a chance in a lottery, but does not include premium bonds issued by any Government.
